name: create-teams-domain
description: Create Teams domain store with enhancement hooks
acceptanceCriteria: All entity identifier fields use 'string.uuid' type for proper MST reference resolution
domain.ts exports TeamsDomain ArkType scope with Organization, Team, OrganizationMember, TeamMember, Invitation, Permission entities
Team.parentTeam uses self-reference pattern, childTeams is computed inverse
domain.ts exports createTeamsStore() factory using createStoreFromScope
enhanceRootStore adds volatile currentOrganization, volatile teamsStatus/teamsError, switchOrganization action, resolvePermission action implementing additive inheritance, initialize action
Store integrates with ITeamsService via getEnv()
Tests verify reference fields resolve to entity instances (not just ID strings)
Tests verify team hierarchy navigation (parentTeam, childTeams)
